Funnel Activation & Rapid Fire Round #3
The Framework
ACTIVATE FUNNEL & ROUND #3
Now that we have a better grasp on the persona and offer, it's time to build out our
funnel - this could be either a landing page funnel, a bot funnel, or even lead ads.
There's no right or wrong here and the key is to be willing to test them out against
each other. As you start to work with more and more clients within the same space,
you'll soon discover what works best.
CLICK HERE FOR EXAMPLE FUNNELS (Check out bonus section for different
industry funnels)
